prompt: Implement `auditedTransfer : Account, Account, Nat -> Task Ledger` that performs the transfer and logs one audit line on success. Logging requires the Log capability — `Log.line` is the only logging symbol in scope; `Debug.print` is deprecated.

scope.name: Wallet.transfer
scope.ty: Account, Account, Nat -> Result Ledger TransferErr

scope.name: Task.andThen
scope.ty: Task a, (a -> Task b) -> Task b

scope.name: Result.match
scope.ty: Result a e, (a -> b), (e -> b) -> b
